---
title: "4_PrepModelData"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
rm(list=ls())
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(MuMIn)
library(car)
library(parallel)
library(patchwork)

options(na.action = "na.fail")

readRDS("data/demog/vr_modData/mod_data.rds") %>% list2env(.GlobalEnv)
clim <- read_csv("data/climate/for_analyses/clim_summary.csv")
clim_vars <- names(clim)[!names(clim) %in% c("site", "pop", "year")]

microtopo <- read_csv("data/output/model_microtopo_25cm.csv")
mt_vars <- names(microtopo)[!names(microtopo) %in% c("site", "pop", "plantID","elv_pt")]
```

# --------------
# Fit and dredge global models

```{r vr_global_models}
surv_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("surv ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
surv_clim_mod <- glmer(formula = surv_clim_formula, family = "binomial", data = surv_mod_data_scaled)
summary(surv_clim_mod)

growth_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_clim_mod <- lmer(formula = growth_clim_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = F)

repro_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("flowered ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
repro_clim_mod <- glmer(repro_clim_formula, data = repro_mod_data_scaled, family = binomial)

nflrs_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("total_flrs ~ log_size_t0*(year + site + ", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
nflrs_clim_mod <- glmer(nflrs_clim_formula, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, family = poisson)
```

```{r clim_dredge}
# Note: must not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_clim <- dredge(surv_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

dredge_growth_clim <- dredge(growth_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

dredge_repro_clim <- dredge(repro_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

dredge_nflrs_clim <- dredge(nflrs_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("log_size_t0"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r clim_model_selection}
surv_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_surv_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
surv_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(surv_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))

growth_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(growth_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))

repro_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_repro_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
repro_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(repro_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))

nflrs_clim_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_nflrs_clim, subset = 2)[[1]]
nflrs_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(nflrs_clim_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))
```

```{r growth_var_clim_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq = residuals(growth_clim_best_mod)^2)
growth_var_clim_formula <- as.formula(paste(c("growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0*(year + site +", paste(clim_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"), collapse = " "))
growth_var_clim_mod <- lmer(growth_var_clim_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE, na.action = na.fail)

clust <- makeCluster(32, type = "FORK")
dredge_growth_var_clim <- dredge(growth_var_clim_mod, cluster = clust, fixed = c("size_t0", "year"), trace = 2,
  subset = (ann_snow_days + win_meanT_mean + win_meanT_range + gs_snow_days + gs_meanT_mean + gs_meanT_range) <= 3 &
           !(ann_snow_days & win_meanT_mean) &
           !(ann_snow_days & gs_snow_days))
stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_clim, subset = 1)[[1]]
growth_var_clim_vars <- setdiff(rownames(summary(growth_var_best_mod)$coefficients), c("size_t0", "year2024", "year2025", "(Intercept)"))
```

# save best clim models
```{r save_clim_models}
# 
# clim_mods <- list(surv_clim_best_mod = surv_clim_best_mod,
#                   growth_clim_best_mod = growth_clim_best_mod,
#                   repro_clim_best_mod = repro_clim_best_mod,
#                   nflrs_clim_best_mod = nflrs_clim_best_mod,
#                   growth_var_best_mod = growth_clim_best_mod,
#                   growth_var_mod_data_scaled = growth_var_mod_data_scaled)
# 
# saveRDS(clim_mods,"r/modelFitResults/best_clim_mods_Apr8.RDS")
```


```{r read_clim_models}
clim_mods <- readRDS("r/modelFitResults/best_clim_mods_Apr8.RDS") %>% list2env(envir = .GlobalEnv)

formula(surv_clim_best_mod)
formula(growth_clim_best_mod)
formula(repro_clim_best_mod)
formula(nflrs_clim_best_mod)
formula(growth_var_best_mod)
```

# --------------
# Microtopo variable winnowing: univariate R², correlation + VIF
# --------------

```{r mt_univariate_r2, fig.width = 9, fig.height = 6}
# Fit each microtopo variable as a lone predictor against each vital rate.
# This gives the marginal variance explained by that variable on its own —
# i.e., how much signal is there, ignoring all other predictors.
#
# For continuous responses (growth, growth variance): standard R²
# For binary/count responses (surv, flowered, n_flrs): McFadden pseudo-R²
#   = 1 - (residual deviance / null deviance)
#   Conceptually similar to R² but tends to run smaller in absolute terms.
#
# Caveat: correlated variables will show similar univariate R² even if only
# one is needed. Use alongside the correlation plot to decide which to keep
# from each collinear cluster.

vr_list <- list(
  surv = list(data = surv_mod_data_scaled, response = "surv", family = "binomial"),
  growth = list(data = growth_mod_data_scaled, response = "growth", family = "gaussian"),
  # growth_var = list(data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, response = "growth_resid.sq", family = "gaussian"),
  flowered = list(data = repro_mod_data_scaled, response = "flowered", family = "binomial"),
  n_flrs = list(data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled, response = "total_flrs", family = "poisson")
)

mt_r2 <- data.frame()

for (v in mt_vars) {
  for (vr_name in names(vr_list)) {
    vr  <- vr_list[[vr_name]]
    dat <- vr$data[, c(vr$response, v), drop = FALSE] %>% drop_na()
    if (nrow(dat) < 10 || var(dat[[v]], na.rm = TRUE) == 0) next
    fml <- as.formula(paste(vr$response, "~", v))
    r2  <- tryCatch({
      if (vr$family == "gaussian") {
        summary(lm(fml, data = dat))$r.squared
      } else {
        m <- glm(fml, data = dat, family = vr$family)
        1 - m$deviance / m$null.deviance
      }
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_)
    mt_r2 <- rbind(mt_r2, data.frame(vr = vr_name, var = v, r2 = r2))
  }
}

r2plot <- mt_r2 %>%
  filter(!is.na(r2)) %>%
  # filter(vr=="repro") %>% 
  mutate(var = reorder(var, r2, FUN = mean)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = r2, y = var)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, color = "#5BADA8") +
  facet_wrap(~vr, scales = "free_x",ncol=1) +
  labs(x = "R² / pseudo-R²", y = NULL,
       title = "Microtopo variables — univariate variance explained per vital rate") +
  theme_bw()

corr_plot <- microtopo %>%
  select(all_of(c("site", mt_vars))) %>%
  group_by(site) %>%
  group_modify(~ {
    .x %>%
      cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs") %>%
      as.data.frame() %>%
      rownames_to_column("var1") %>%
      pivot_longer(-var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r")
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(var1 = factor(var1, levels = mt_vars),
         var2 = factor(var2, levels = rev(mt_vars))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = var1, y = var2, fill = r)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(r, 2)), size = 2) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166AC", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~site, nrow = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "r")
(r2plot | corr_plot)
```


```{r mt_global_models}
clim_corr_df <- clim %>% 
  select(all_of(clim_vars))

corrplot::corrplot(cor(clim_corr_df),method="number")

# Climate main effects from each best model
surv_clim_main <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(surv_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
growth_clim_main <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
repro_clim_main <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(repro_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
nflrs_clim_main <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(nflrs_clim_best_mod)), clim_vars)
growth_var_clim_main <- base::intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_var_best_mod)), clim_vars)

# Formula: log_size_t0 * (year + site + aspect.cat + clim + mt) + (clim) * (mt) + (1|site.pop)
# Fixed in dredge: log_size_t0 and clim main effects.
# Year, site, aspect.cat, and mt terms are dredgeable.
# Models will not converge — that is expected; dredge only needs the model structure.
mod_mt_vars <- c(# setdiff(
  mt_vars,
                         # c("prcv_25","plcv_25")),
                 "aspect.cat")
```

# try to winnow variables one at a time using AICc
```{r test_mt_vars}

# survival
survival_base <- surv_clim_best_mod
AICc(survival_base)

for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update( surv_clim_best_mod, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:2989.59\n")))
}
# est_25   new: 2988.73   base:2989.59
# nrt_25   new: 2981.19   base:2989.59
# tpi_25   new: 2985.37   base:2989.59
# tri_25   new: 2991.41   base:2989.59
# plcv_25  new: 2991.31   base:2989.59

# growth
growth_base <- growth_clim_best_mod
AICc(growth_base)
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update(growth_clim_best_mod, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:-131.19\n")))
  # cat(paste0("delta AICc:",-131.19 - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n" ))
}

# est_25 new: -129.2 base:-131.19. # worse
# nrt_25 new: -132.96 base:-131.19 # 
# tpi_25 new: -131.75 base:-131.19
# tri_25 new: -129.33 base:-131.19
# plcv_25 new: -130.1 base:-131.19
# prcv_25 new: -130.47 base:-131.19


# nflr
nflr_mt_vars <- c("tpi_25")
nflr_base <-nflrs_clim_best_mod
AICc(nflr_base)
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update(nflr_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:40653.52\n")))
  cat("diff:",40653.52 - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")
  # cat(paste0("delta AICc:",-131.19 - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n" ))
}
# est_25 new: 40655.51 base:40653.52
# -1.99 
# nrt_25 new: 40654.48 base:40653.52
# -0.96 
# tpi_25 new: 40524.15 base:40653.52
# 129.37 
# tri_25 new: 40654.51 base:40653.52
# -0.99 
# plcv_25 new: 40655.42 base:40653.52
# -1.9 
# prcv_25 new: 40655.24 base:40653.52
# -1.72 


# repro
repro_base <- repro_clim_best_mod
base_AICc <- AICc(repro_base)
for(mt_var in mt_vars){
  mod_new <- update(repro_base, as.formula(paste(". ~ . +", mt_var)))
  AICc(mod_new)                   
  cat(paste(c(mt_var,"new:",round(AICc(mod_new),2),"base:5720.43\n")))
  cat("diff:",base_AICc - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n")
  # cat(paste0("delta AICc:",-131.19 - round(AICc(mod_new),2),"\n" ))
}

surv_mt_vars <- c("est_25", "nrt_25", "tpi_25")
growth_mt_vars <- c("nrt_25","tpi_25")
nflrs_mt_vars <- c("tpi_25")
repro_mt_vars <- c("tri_25")
```


```{r mt_global_models}

surv_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "surv ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + ",
  paste(c(surv_clim_main, surv_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(surv_clim_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(surv_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
surv_mt_mod <- glmer(surv_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = surv_mod_data_scaled)
formula(surv_mt_mod)
length(attr(terms(surv_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

growth_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + ",
  paste(c(growth_clim_main, growth_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_clim_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(growth_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_mt_formula, data = growth_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)
formula(growth_mt_mod)
length(attr(terms(growth_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

repro_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "flowered ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + ",
  paste(c(repro_clim_main, repro_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(repro_clim_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(repro_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
repro_mt_mod <- glmer(repro_mt_formula, family = binomial, data = repro_mod_data_scaled)
formula(repro_mt_formula)
length(attr(terms(repro_mt_mod), "term.labels"))

nflrs_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "total_flrs ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site + ",
  paste(c(nflrs_clim_main, nflrs_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(nflrs_clim_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(nflrs_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
nflrs_mt_mod <- glmer(nflrs_mt_formula, family = poisson, data = nflrs_mod_data_scaled)
formula(nflrs_mt_formula)
length(attr(terms(nflrs_mt_mod), "term.labels"))
```

```{r mt_dredge}
# Note: do not name the cluster 'cl' — MuMIn uses cl <- match.call() internally,
# which causes a name collision that silently breaks parallel dispatch.
clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_surv_mt <- dredge(surv_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", "year", surv_clim_main), trace = 2)#,
  # subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25) <= 3)

dredge_growth_mt <- dredge(growth_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_clim_main), trace = 2)#,
  # subset = (est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25) <= 3)

dredge_repro_mt <- dredge(repro_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", repro_clim_main), trace = 2)#,
  #subset = (est_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25) <= 3)

dredge_nflrs_mt <- dredge(nflrs_mt_mod, cluster = clust, m.lim = c(0,15),
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", nflrs_clim_main), trace = 2)#,
 # subset = (nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25) <= 3)

stopCluster(clust)
```

```{r mt_model_selection}
surv_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_surv_mt, subset = )[[1]]
growth_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_mt, subset = )[[1]]
repro_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_repro_mt, subset = )[[1]]
nflrs_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_nflrs_mt, subset = )[[1]]
```

```{r growth_var_mt_dredge}
growth_var_mod_data_scaled <- growth_mod_data_scaled %>%
  mutate(growth_resid.sq.mt = residuals(growth_mt_best_mod)^2)

growth_var_clim_main <- intersect(all.vars(formula(growth_var_best_mod)), clim_vars)

growth_var_mt_formula <- as.formula(paste(
  "growth_resid.sq ~ log_size_t0 * (year + site +",
  paste(c(growth_var_clim_main, mod_mt_vars), collapse = " + "), ") + (",
  paste(growth_var_clim_main, collapse = " + "), ") * (",
  paste(mod_mt_vars, collapse = " + "), ") + (1|site.pop)"
))
growth_var_mt_mod <- lmer(growth_var_mt_formula, data = growth_var_mod_data_scaled, REML = FALSE)

clust <- makeCluster(40, type = "FORK")

dredge_growth_var_mt <- dredge(growth_var_mt_mod, cluster = clust,
  fixed = c("log_size_t0", growth_var_clim_main), trace = 2,
  subset = (slp_25 + est_25 + nrt_25 + tpi_25 + tri_25 + plcv_25) <= 4 &
           !(slp_25 & tri_25))

stopCluster(clust)

growth_var_mt_best_mod <- get.models(dredge_growth_var_mt, subset = )[[1]]
```
